title: Filter Workspace by Item
excerpt: We’ve created a Workspace for our HR - Employee Records so we have all our commencement, training and termination records in one place - a new board for each employee, Archived after termination. It would be great if we …

posts.author: AmandaW (Amanda Wood)
posts.cookedHtml:
We’ve created a Workspace for our HR - Employee Records so we have all our commencement, training and termination records in one place - a new board for each employee, Archived after termination. It would be great if we could filter that Workspace by a single Item, say Site Induction, or VOC so that we would have a register of details for current employees.
